scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:backend
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend run lint:check && pnpm --filter backend run lint:check
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter frontend run lint && pnpm --filter backend run lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter frontend run format && pnpm --filter backend run format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter frontend run format:check && pnpm --filter backend run format:check
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules node_modules frontend/dist backend/dist
